title: bug affecting simple function to pick an item at random
description:
### What happens?

My bug, my apologies.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_array (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, values VARCHAR);
SELECT SPLIT(values, ',')[0] AS value FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT SPLIT(values, ',')[1] AS value FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT SPLIT(values, ',')[2] AS value FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: selecting an out-of-bounds index from an array
